meta.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest concrete artifact set, releasing Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena and introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM for more natural, interruption-robust voice interaction. Anthropic also appeared to unveil a new Claude Mythos model, while a separate Lyptus Research paper on offensive cyber task horizons points to growing investor and policy focus on measuring where frontier models can automate higher-risk security work.

items.title: How Iran out-shitposted the White House
items.summary_short: In the early days of the war on Iran, while the White House was busy posting Call of Duty memes and AI slop of dancing bowling pins, the Iranian regime's state media was flooding the zone with video after video of what was happening on the ground: Explosions over Tehran. Smoke billowing in the sky.

items.summary_short: Claude Code skill for generating production-quality SVG+PNG technical diagrams. Supports 8 diagram types, 5 visual styles, and deep AI/Agent domain knowledge

items.title: nashsu/llm_wiki
items.summary_short: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that turns your documents into an organized, interlinked knowledge base — automatically. Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。

featured_topics.headline: ByteDance Ships Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
featured_topics.summary_short: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The item marks the formal release of the new model
featured_topics.why_it_matters: ByteDance is signaling continued model expansion beyond text into real-time speech, a strategic indicator for multimodal product competition and enterprise voice interfaces.
key_takeaways: ByteDance Seed released Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena, indicating an externally visible preview deployment rather than an internal-only research update.
The company separately introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, emphasizing attentive listening, interference suppression, and more natural turn-taking in spoken interaction.
The cluster also included ByteDance Seed's 2027 foundation model recruiting push, suggesting the company is still scaling talent investment alongside model releases.

evidence.title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Released on Arena

featured_topics.headline: Anthropic Reportedly Introduces Claude Mythos
featured_topics.summary_short: The Batch published a roundup covering Anthropic's Claude Mythos issue, Dark DNA, pitfalls for assistive models, and fluid dynamics simulation. It is an editorial summary spanning multiple topics rather than a single new announcement
featured_topics.why_it_matters: Any net-new Claude variant matters for buyers and competitors because Anthropic remains one of the few labs shaping enterprise model selection at the frontier.
key_takeaways: The underlying artifact is a model named Claude Mythos, referenced by both Superhuman AI and The Batch.
No benchmark numbers, pricing, context window, or API availability details were provided in the source cluster, limiting immediate commercial assessment.
Because Anthropic model launches often cascade into enterprise procurement and application retuning decisions, even an early signal of a new Claude family member is strategically relevant.

evidence.title: Anthropic announces new Claude Mythos model
Anthropic’s Claude Mythos Problem, Dark DNA Unveiled, Pitfalls for Assistive Models, Simulating Fluid Dynamics

featured_topics.headline: Lyptus Research Publishes 'Offensive Cyber Task Horizons: Data and Analysis'
featured_topics.summary_short: Import AI linked to 'Offensive Cyber Task Horizons: Data and Analysis' from Lyptus Research, with materials on GitHub. The work appears to provide data and analysis on the time horizons associated with offensive cyber tasks
featured_topics.why_it_matters: Cyber-capability measurement is becoming a critical diligence area for frontier model risk, regulation, and defense-sector product strategy.
key_takeaways: The paper focuses on offensive cyber task horizons, framing model capability in terms of how long and complex a cybersecurity task an AI system can complete.
The work was highlighted by Import AI as a distinct research artifact, suggesting relevance to frontier-risk evaluation rather than general AI commentary.
For executives and investors, task-horizon analysis is more decision-useful than generic benchmark scores because it maps model progress to operationally meaningful security workflows.

evidence.title: Offensive Cyber Task Horizons: Data and Analysis (Lyptus Research, GitHub)
Offensive Cybersecurity Time Horizons (Lyptus Research)
